# BP-134 variant positive: Take errors have no not-found branch.
lang: go
file: BP-134-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-take-uniform-error
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct{}

func takeUser(db *gorm.DB, user *User) error {
	if err := db.Take(user).Error; err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
